theme_notes: Spain beat Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium; Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married at Madison Square Garden; Andy Burnham became UK Prime Minister; Russia fired 125 drones and 41 missiles at Ukraine overnight; Ryan Fox won The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale at age 39; US-Iran strikes enter week two with the Strait of Hormuz still contested.
settled: Spain just won the World Cup. You just broke even. Both feel equally unreal.
Balanced like the Strait of Hormuz — technically open, nobody's celebrating.
Taylor Swift got married and your finances are the tidier love story. Somehow.
youOwe: Less than the bar tab from watching Spain beat Argentina. Both shameful.
Andy Burnham inherited a whole country today. You inherited this debt.
Ryan Fox won his first major at 39. Your debt is younger and less accomplished.
Iran's had the Strait of Hormuz locked for a week. You've had this IOU longer.
Not enough to buy Taylor Swift's wedding cake slice on eBay. Give it a week.
Russia launched 125 drones overnight. You can't launch a single Venmo request.
Enough for a solid World Cup final watch party. You chose debt instead.
Spain ended Argentina's dynasty for less drama than your payment history.
Ryan Fox won The Open at 39 as his first major. More impressive than your excuses.
Travis Kelce married Taylor Swift today. Your wedding gift instinct is to owe.
UK has a new Prime Minister. You have the same old debt. Burnham inherited less.
Russia launched 41 missiles last night. Cheaper per unit than your running tab.
Spain's per-player World Cup bonus was lower than what you owe. Let that land.
Andy Burnham campaigned on change. Your financial behavior begs to differ.
Taylor Swift's MSG wedding had fireworks. Your debt has compound interest.
You are now an economic threat on par with the Strait of Hormuz blockade.
Travis Kelce's wedding registry was smaller than this. Taylor noticed. Worry.
Spain's entire World Cup prize pool went to players. Yours went here. Somehow.
theyOwe: They owe you less than Ryan Fox's caddy tip at Royal Birkdale. Collect it.
Smaller than a World Cup souvenir pin. The principle stands.
Andy Burnham owes his coalition more than this. That's the bar. They cleared it.
About what it costs to stream the World Cup final in 4K. They watched for free.
A slow-burn Russian drone debt. Launched last week, still circling.
Andrew Tate's Miami lawyers billed more in the first hour. He's in handcuffs.
Two nosebleed seats at the World Cup final. That's what they owe you.
Spain lifted the trophy at MetLife. They haven't lifted a finger to pay you.
Iranian missile math: cheaper per unit. Their silence: compounding daily.
Ryan Fox waited 39 years for his first major. You've waited long enough for this.
New UK PM, same old IOUs. Burnham's going to inherit this debt eventually.
Enough to reroute a tanker around the Strait. Take the long way. Bill them.
Taylor Swift's wedding florist billed more than this. Flowers at least die.
The US struck Iran for less provocation than this level of avoidance.
Spain beat Argentina in the final. You can't even beat this out of them.
You are owed more than the daily Strait of Hormuz rerouting surcharge. Collect.
Argentina lost a World Cup final. You lost even more. You deserve better.
Taylor Swift would have the album out by now. You have a Google Sheet.
